title: echiostachys ecklonianus
intro: Echiostachys ecklonianus, also known as the yellow-fruited echiostachys, is a plant species native to South Africa. It belongs to the family of plants known as Apocynaceae, and has been used traditionally in folk medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant's leaves are used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
